articles.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
articles.title_original: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
articles.summary: 이 기사는 'Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech' 관련 내용을 다룬다. 공개된 기사 요약에 따르면 Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products. 핵심 배경과 세부 수치, 실제 적용 영향은 원문 링크에서 함께 확인하는 것이 좋다.
articles.summary_original: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.

articles.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
articles.title_original: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
articles.summary: 이 기사는 'The next evolution of the Agents SDK' 관련 내용을 다룬다. 공개된 기사 요약에 따르면 OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools. 핵심 배경과 세부 수치, 실제 적용 영향은 원문 링크에서 함께 확인하는 것이 좋다.
articles.summary_original: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.

articles.title: Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX
articles.title_original: Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX
articles.summary: 이 기사는 'Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX' 관련 내용을 다룬다. 공개된 기사 요약에 따르면 The practice of privacy-led user experience (UX) is a design philosophy that treats transparency around data collection and usage as an integral part of the customer relationship. An undertapped opportunity in digital marketing, privacy-led UX treats user consent not as a tick-box compliance exerci… 핵심 배경과 세부 수치, 실제 적용 영향은 원문 링크에서 함께 확인하는 것이 좋다.
articles.summary_original: The practice of privacy-led user experience (UX) is a design philosophy that treats transparency around data collection and usage as an integral part of the customer relationship. An undertapped opportunity in digital marketing, privacy-led UX treats user consent not as a tick-box compliance exercise, but rather as the first overture in an ongoing customer relationship.…

articles.title: Prompting fundamentals
articles.summary: 이 기사는 'Prompting fundamentals' 관련 내용을 다룬다. 공개된 기사 요약에 따르면 Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT. 핵심 배경과 세부 수치, 실제 적용 영향은 원문 링크에서 함께 확인하는 것이 좋다.
articles.summary_original: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.

articles.title: Working with files in ChatGPT

articles.summary_original: Learn how to upload and work with files in ChatGPT to analyze data, summarize documents, and generate content from PDFs, spreadsheets, and more.
